trivia_bullets.text: Tuskguard Captain is an Abzan Houses uncommon from Khans of Tarkir (2014-09-26). Outlast is the Abzan's signature mechanic; Tuskguard Captain is one of six Outlast 'counter lords' in the set, each granting a different keyword to creatures that bear +1/+1 counters. [Scryfall], [Wizards: Mechanics of Khans of Tarkir]

Tuskguard Captain grants trample to every creature you control with a +1/+1 counter — not just those that Outlasted. Any counter source (Hardened Scales, Cathars' Crusade, Rishkar, Vorel) immediately turns the board into a trample engine. EDHREC: 27,445 Commander decks, rank 5,090. Top co-cards: Mer-Ek Nightblade, Ivorytusk Fortress, Daghatar the Adamant. [EDHREC], [Scryfall]

"One quiet word sets off the stampede." [Scryfall] — Captures Abzan command-chain ethos: authority through restraint. The Tuskguard are the mounted warriors riding the great Abzan tusked beasts; the captain's single word directs the charge.

Tuskguard Captain has been reprinted five times: Commander 2016 (no. 173, 2016-11-11), Commander Anthology Volume II (no. 147, 2018-06-08), Zendikar Rising Commander (no. 85, 2020-09-25), Double Masters 2022 (no. 163, 2022-07-08), Commander Masters (no. 328, 2023-08-04). Five reprints in nine years signals sustained Commander demand. [Scryfall prints search]

Illustrated by Aaron Miller (87+ MTG cards since 2013). Miller runs an independent art business with Kickstarter-funded foil token packs and artist-proof sales, and has been featured on Hipsters of the Coast for community and Kickstarter work. [Hipsters of the Coast: Aaron Miller archive]
